---
title: "Blog"
toc: false
listing:
  contents: posts
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: true
  fields: [date, title, categories, description]
---

<h2 class="section-heading">Blog & Notes</h2>
<hr class="section-rule">

<p style="font-size:0.95rem;color:#444;line-height:1.8;max-width:680px;margin-bottom:2rem;">
A mix of methodological notes, R tutorials, and occasional essays — on formal demography, mortality estimation, and questions at the boundary of science and philosophy. The Balzac project (reading all 91 novels of <em>La Comédie Humaine</em> through a demographic lens) also lives here.
</p>
